title: Shatura Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Shatura with a Z-Score of +3.00. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Shatura are characterized by high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 9.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is 44%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is 6.1 km/h. 
 The Heat Wave has a significant impact on the city, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
